commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude stream-json tool-use tracking in the CLI JSONL parser, injects tool markers/timers into assistant deltas, and emits `stream: "tool"` events from Claude CLI execution paths.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR findings by source inspection: current main's channel and UI contracts require verbose-gated tool delivery and `data.toolCallId`, while the PR injects assistant text unconditionally and emits `itemId` only. No current-main bug reproduction is needed because this is a feature PR.
commands.review_followup: Human review/contributor revision is needed because this draft external PR has security/privacy and behavior-contract blockers plus incomplete real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live environment proof.

target.title: feat(cli-output): tool-use injection + rolling-timer indicator for claude-stream-json backends
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
